signal_evidence: Between 2022-10-07 and 2022-10-07, the customer conducted 2 transaction(s) — predominantly cash withdrawals — amounting to approximately NPR 65,539.
The principal counterparties observed were Caleb Kelley.
the velocity and aggregate value of the funds are not fully consistent with that profile.
a number of the transfers appear to have been deliberately kept below reporting thresholds and were executed in rapid succession, a pattern the officer considers consistent with Cash Withdrawal.
noise_evidence: For context, the customer's KYC file lists a modest declared income profile; in the reviewing officer's judgement the velocity and aggregate value of the funds are not fully consistent with that profile.
This report is submitted out of an abundance of caution for the compliance unit's further analysis and does not, by itself, constitute a determination of wrongdoing.
